title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Novartis India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Novartis India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at Novartis India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Jaipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Novartis India International Enterprises:
Novartis India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Novartis India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
